objective:
[Scalp de continuation / micro-retournement] sur [crypto liquide] [5m ou 15m].
Indicateurs : [EMA 9/21/50] + [RSI 14] + [Bandes de Bollinger 20,2].
Entrées : [pullback vers EMA 21 avec RSI repartant dans le sens de la micro-tendance et rejet d’une bande] / [excès sur bande externe avec RSI en surachat/survente et signal de retournement court terme].
Sorties : [take-profit sur extension vers bande opposée ou prochain niveau de structure] / [sortie anticipée si clôture franche contre la position ou divergence RSI].
Risk management : [stop-loss sous dernier plus bas/haut local ou 1× ATR] / [ratio minimum 1,5] / [risque fixe 1–2 % du capital par trade].

iterations.hypothesis: Capture short-term continuations or micro-reversals by combining EMA, RSI, and Bollinger Bands for high-quality signals.
iterations.error: IndexError: invalid index to scalar variable.

iterations.hypothesis: The strategy aims to capitalize on short-term continuations or micro-reversals in BTCUSDC by combining EMA pullbacks with Bollinger Band rejections and RSI confirmation. This approach seeks to capture high-quality entries with clear exit criteria, ensuring robust risk management.

By relaxing RSI thresholds and simplifying entry logic using EMA trend with Bollinger Band rejections, the strategy should generate more frequent trades while maintaining directional bias for higher win rates.
